name: Activate Energy Acquisition Corp.
business: Activate Energy Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific target and has not engaged in substantive discussions with any potential target. The company intends to focus on the oil and gas industry.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue an acquisition opportunity in any business, industry, sector or geographical location, we intend to focus on industries that complement our management team s and board of director s background and network, and to capitalize on the ability of our management team and board of directors to identify and acquire a business, focusing on the oil and gas industry.
